title: Turnhout、Antwerp — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Turnhout、Antwerpの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

TurnhoutはAntwerpにある人口46,000の都市です。The capital of the Kempen region, known for its printing and playing card industry, historic castle, and surrounding nature reserves.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
